messages.content:
Accenture is a founding member of ID 2020.

What is the focus of this alliance?


blockchain


financial services


digital identity


supply chain


I don't know this yet.
The focus of the ID 2020 alliance is digital identity.

Which statement is true about blockchain?


Blockchain enables users to verify that data tampering has not occurred.


Blockchain always requires a central authority as an intermediary.


Blockchain encourages trust among all peers.


Blockchain guarantees the accuracy of the data.


I don't know this yet.
The true statement about blockchain is that it enables users to verify that data tampering has not occurred.

A potential customer wants to find out how blockchain can benefit their company and why they should use Accenture’s Multi-party Systems practice.

Which factor describes the value of using Accenture’s Multi-party Systems practice?


limited partnerships to keep ecosystems small and manageable


a universal solution that fits all clients equally


Accenture’s technology and operational experience with blockchain


Accenture’s total number of employees worldwide


I don't know this yet.
The factor that describes the value of using Accenture's Multi-party Systems practice is Accenture's technology and operational experience with blockchain.

What is the difference between encryption and hashing?


Hashing is reversible, while encryption is not.


Encryption requires less information to begin the process than hashing.


Encryption is reversible, while hashing is not.


Hashing requires less information to begin the process than encryption.


I don't know this yet.
The difference between encryption and hashing is that encryption is reversible, while hashing is not.

How does blockchain technology help organizations when sharing data?


Data can be edited or removed only through certain authorized central nodes.


Data can be processed or viewed at only one node in the chain at any given time.


Everyone has transparency over how the data has been added.


Data can only be exchanged through a central, trusted organization.


I don't know this yet.
Blockchain technology helps organizations when sharing data by enabling everyone to have transparency over how the data has been added.

An Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) provider shares its computing resources between a number of different clients, each of whom has a separate dedicated instance to host their own operating systems and applications.

Which Cloud computing concept is illustrated here?


multi-regional support


elasticity


resiliency


multitenancy


I don't know this yet.
The Cloud computing concept illustrated here is multitenancy.

An electronics company wants to use a type of Cloud computing architecture that would enable them to use Microsoft Azure as a platform, while storing and retrieving data in AWS.

Which type of Cloud deployment would meet the company’s business needs?


Hybrid Cloud


Public Cloud


Private Cloud


Multi-Cloud


I don't know this yet.
The type of Cloud deployment that would meet the company's business needs is a Multi-Cloud deployment.

What distinguishes Accenture’s Cloud capabilities from our competitors?


offering mobile accessibility for corporate data via smartphones and other devices


enabling clients to host Cloud services using their own on-premise infrastructure


providing end-to-end solutioning that includes technology, innovation, and industry specialization


allowing clients to choose the memory, location, and speed of the Cloud services that they want to use


I don't know this yet.
What distinguishes Accenture's Cloud capabilities from our competitors is providing end-to-end solutioning that includes technology, innovation, and industry specialization.

What describes the relationship between edge computing and Cloud computing?


Cloud computing originally began as an extension of edge computing.


Cloud computing is a continuum of which edge is a key component.


Edge computing sits at the center of the network while Cloud sits at the periphery.


Edge computing will eventually overtake and replace Cloud computing.


I don't know this yet.
The relationship between edge computing and Cloud computing is that Cloud computing is a continuum of which edge is a key component.

What is the difference between Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) and Software as a Service (SaaS)?


IaaS is Cloud computing that provides hardware and software tools over the internet. SaaS is Cloud computing that provides database solutions over the internet.


IaaS is Cloud computing that provides virtualized computing resources over the internet. SaaS is a form of Cloud computing that provides hosted applications over the internet.


IaaS is a form of Cloud computing that provides virtualized computing resources over the internet. SaaS is a form of Cloud computing that provides hardware and software tools over the internet.


IaaS is a form of Cloud computing that provides hardware and software tools over the internet. SaaS is a form of Cloud computing that provides virtualized computing resources over the internet.


I don't know this yet.

The difference between Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) and Software as a Service (SaaS) is that IaaS is a form of Cloud computing that provides virtualized computing resources over the internet, while SaaS is a form of Cloud computing that provides hosted applications over the internet.

The Ocean Medallion is a wearable device that connects virtually to various devices on board a cruise ship. When a guest is wearing the medallion, they can order a drink with their smartphone or open their cabin door automatically by standing in front of it.

Which emerging technology does Cloud combine with to enable this medallion's features?


Internet of Things (IoT)


Data Visualization​


Extended Reality


DevOps


I don't know this yet.
The Cloud combines with the Internet of Things (IoT) to enable the features of the Ocean Medallion wearable device.

A chain of dry-cleaning outlets wants to improve its operations by using data from devices at individual locations to make real-time adjustments to service delivery.

Which technology would the business combine with its current Cloud operations to make this possible?


Data Visualization


Edge Computing


Blockchain


Public Cloud


I don't know this yet.
The technology that the business would combine with its current Cloud operations to make real-time adjustments to service delivery based on data from individual locations is Edge Computing.

Accenture is meeting with a well-known, global financial institution that specializes in private and commercial banking to discuss the migration of its sizable application ecosystem to the Cloud. The client has quickly become overwhelmed with the available choices, complexity, and security.

Which tool helps the client self-assess their Cloud landscape to determine the best solution?


DiPA (Digital People Advisor)


myNav


Work Management System (WMS)


myConcerto


I don't know this yet.
The tool that helps the client self-assess their Cloud landscape to determine the best solution is myNav.

A Software Developer wants to add a new feature to an existing application operating in the Cloud, but only wants to pay for the computing time the code actually uses when it is called.

Which term describes this feature of computing?


elasticity


multitenancy


pooled resources


serverless computing


I don't know this yet.
The term that describes the feature of computing where the user only pays for the computing time the code actually uses when it is called is serverless computing.

A healthcare client approaches Accenture for help in defining their Cloud migration strategy. During the initial discussions, the client explains that there are very specific regulatory and other compliance requirements within their industry.

Which Cloud deployment model would give this client complete control over their data and security?


Public Cloud


Open Cloud Model


Multi-Cloud


Private Cloud


I don't know this yet.
The Cloud deployment model that would give this healthcare client complete control over their data and security is a Private Cloud.

Which capability of myNav helps clients with reskilling their employees?


talent transformation


design and architecture


migrations and operations


discovery and assessment


I don't know this yet.
The capability of myNav that helps clients with reskilling their employees is talent transformation.

What is a characteristic of Cloud computing?


It reserves a certain portion of its computing resources to individual clients.


It provides fixed computing resources based on the terms of the client contract.


It limits access to each application to one user at a time in order to avoid conflicts.


It allows multiple customers to share applications while retaining data privacy.


I don't know this yet.
A characteristic of Cloud computing is that it allows multiple customers to share applications while retaining data privacy.

How does a Cloud-first strategy approach a client's migration to the Cloud?


by bringing multiple services together to serve the client's business needs


by enabling the client to manage their Cloud transformation on their own


by focusing on a single discipline based on the client's greatest area of need


by removing outside ecosystem partners from the Cloud transition process


I don't know this yet.
A Cloud-first strategy approaches a client's migration to the Cloud by bringing multiple services together to serve the client's business needs.

What would be an ideal scenario for using edge computing solutions?


a regional sales report uploaded to a central server once a week


a hospital department that performs high-risk, time-sensitive surgeries


an office where workers are directly connected to the company network


a farming business whose equipment is older and lacks digital devices


I don't know this yet.
An ideal scenario for using edge computing solutions would be a hospital department that performs high-risk, time-sensitive surgeries.

In the future, where will an increasing majority of data come from?


corporate office headquarters


individual users and devices


centralized data warehouses


physical memory storage drives


I don't know this yet.
In the future, an increasing majority of data will come from individual users and devices.

Company A acquired Company B and they realize that their standard security policy documents do not match. They escalate this issue to the company’s central Security team, who implements a plan to formalize security strategy, high-level responsibilities, policies and procedures around security of both companies.

Which security principle is illustrated in this example?


Availability


Risk Management


Compliance


Governance


I don't know this yet.
The security principle illustrated in this example is Governance.

A Development team begins work on a new software application and decides to involve the client’s IT experts to ensure that security concerns are addressed on an ongoing basis throughout the project’s lifecycle.

Which security capability is responsible for securing the software?


Risk Management


Security Operations


Identity and Access Management


Application Security


I don't know this yet.
The security capability responsible for securing the software in this scenario is Application Security.

A company’s authentication system recognizes that a user account just logged in from a different region than previous logins, and on a different device.

Which concept of Security does this relate to?


Product Security


Cyber Intelligence


Identity and Access Management


Data Security


I don't know this yet.
The concept of security that this scenario relates to is Identity and Access Management.

An employee at a large global firm is sending a document with sensitive information to a co-worker in another country.

How should the contents of the document be protected?


by using a risk management tool to ensure the data will be safe before sending


by updating the company's security software on the co-worker's machine


by using encryption to ensure the data can only be seen by the coworker


by complying with external security requirements- when transferring data


I don't know this yet.
The contents of the document should be protected by using encryption to ensure that the data can only be seen by the coworker.

Why are Accenture's internal security practices important to clients?


Clients want a partner that values secure practices for itself.


Clients want to eliminate the need for physical security.


Clients want to document the chain of responsibility.


Clients want to reduce their own internal security budget.


I don't know this yet.
Accenture's internal security practices are important to clients because clients want a partner that values secure practices for itself.

Which action is appropriate for an organization to consider when integrating a new application or platform that deals with sensitive information?


Follow only proprietary best practices when designing an application to mitigate threats.


Copy the best practices of other organizations and implement them without changes.


Include security specialists at the beginning and throughout the process.


Build all applications in the same programming language to enhance security.


I don't know this yet.

An appropriate action for an organization to consider when integrating a new application or platform that deals with sensitive information is to include security specialists at the beginning and throughout the process.

What is one way new and relevant threats can be identified and documented?


by searching for foreign government documents


by reading well-known malware books


by installing ransomware or malware


by conducting threat intelligence research


I don't know this yet.
One way new and relevant threats can be identified and documented is by conducting threat intelligence research.

What should Accenture’s security team focus on to address this particular client's concern?


Accenture will delay the migration if there are vulnerabilities present in the client’s current systems.


Accenture’s Information Security Team uses waterfall methodology to ensure the migration is fully documented.


Accenture is the only company that has the experience needed to implement major Cloud transformations.


Accenture has developed accelerators that can deploy specific security controls to Cloud environments in just a few hours, thereby reducing costs.


I don't know this yet.

To address this particular client's concern, Accenture's security team should focus on deploying specific security controls to Cloud environments using accelerators that can be implemented in a few hours, thereby reducing costs.

Why should even small-sized companies be vigilant about security?


Smaller companies are more vulnerable to social engineering.


Cyberattacks often come from commercial competitors.


Smaller companies are not often targets of cyberattacks.


Cyberattacks are opportunistic regardless of company size.


I don't know this yet.
Even small-sized companies should be vigilant about security because cyberattacks are opportunistic regardless of company size.

In addition to innovation, which strength can Accenture apply to help a global telecom solve security problems?


cadence expertise and closing experience


legitimacy and commercial experience


governance and tenancy knowledge


global experience and industry expertise


I don't know this yet.
In addition to innovation, Accenture can apply its global experience and industry expertise to help a global telecom solve security problems.

An international airport approaches Accenture to help identify their existing security vulnerabilities.

In which way can one of Accenture’s Red Team use its state-of-the-art tools and capabilities to help the client?


Brief the airlines about potential cyber threats in the market.


Hack into the air traffic control system to expose vulnerabilities and suggest remedies.


Work with the airport security team to ensure their employees know how to comply with international regulations.


Create in-depth aviator simulations to help users steer clear of cyber security threats.


I don't know this yet.

One way Accenture's Red Team can use its state-of-the-art tools and capabilities to help the international airport is by conducting in-depth aviator simulations to help users steer clear of cybersecurity threats.

What is the goal of a Red versus Blue Team exercise?


To assess an existing security team’s performance (people, process, and technologies in place) during a simulated cyber-attack.


To assess the effectiveness of a recent security inclusion and diversity training program.


To assess the capabilities of a prospective new hire for the security team.


To assess an existing security team’s performance (people, process, and technologies in place) during an on-going cyber-attack.


I don't know this yet.
The goal of a Red versus Blue Team exercise is to assess an existing security team's performance (people, process, and technologies in place) during a simulated cyber-attack.

An employee receives a phone call from someone saying they are from the bank. The person claims the purpose of the call is to verify online security information, including passwords and account numbers.

What kind of call is this?


threat intelligence


multifactor authentication


access management


social engineering


I don't know this yet.
The kind of call that the employee receives is an example of social engineering.

Why does Accenture make training on client security, data security, and internal security mandatory?


employees are currently preventing security breaches


because security is everyone's business


to build the most vibrant workforce in the world


to align business management with IT


I don't know this yet.
Accenture makes training on client security, data security, and internal security mandatory because security is everyone's business.

Which technology trend do most cyber risk managers believe has made organizations more vulnerable to security compromises?


tiny Artificial Intelligence (AI)


quantum computing


digitization


digital currency


I don't know this yet.
Most cyber risk managers believe that digitization has made organizations more vulnerable to security compromises.

Which technologies combine to make data a critical organizational asset?


Internet of Things (IoT) and electronic devices


Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence (AI)


Speech and Natural Language Processing (NLP)


Penetration Testing and Intelligence Practice


I don't know this yet.
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies combine to make data a critical organizational asset.

How does Accenture help companies harness the power of data to achieve optimal business outcomes?


They develop data governance frameworks that go on to form the basis of the company's data analytics strategy.


They help companies think about and define the "art of the possible" with their data assets.


They provide an interactive front end for a database solution that changes the data culture.


They utilize only their data and analytics platform to enable companies.


I don't know this yet.
Accenture helps companies harness the power of data to achieve optimal business outcomes by helping them think about and define the "art of the possible" with their data assets.

Accenture is involved in the transformation of an organization into a data-driven and intelligent enterprise.

Which ability does Accenture need to ensure the organization has to become a successful business?


to capture, curate, and consume the right data sets


to store large amounts of data including raw and unorganized facts


to collect exabytes and zettabytes of data from different sources


to gather, re-organize, and store different categories of all raw data for easy and faster retrieval


I don't know this yet.

To ensure the organization becomes a successful business in the transformation towards a data-driven and intelligent enterprise, Accenture needs the ability to capture, curate, and consume the right data sets.

What function do regulations like the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) serve?


to ensure companies are safeguarding customer data according to a set of minimum standards


to enforce the protection of consumer data through criminal penalties against non-compliant corporations


to encourage companies to invest in data protection through compliance subsidies


to allow government agencies access to companies' customer data in the case of criminal proceedings


I don't know this yet.
Regulations like the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) serve the function of ensuring companies are safeguarding customer data according to a set of minimum standards.
